# Pull Request 模板 / Pull Request Template

## 更改摘要 / Summary of Changes
简要描述此PR的更改内容。
Briefly describe what this PR changes.

## 更改类型 / Type of Change
请删除不适用的选项 / Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug修复 (不会破坏现有功能的修复) / Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 新功能 (不会破坏现有功能的新增功能) / New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 破坏性更改 (修复或功能会导致现有功能无法按预期工作) / Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 文档更新 / Documentation update
- [ ] 性能改进 / Performance improvement
- [ ] 代码重构 / Code refactoring
- [ ] 测试更新 / Test updates
- [ ] 其他 / Other

## 相关Issue / Related Issues
修复 #(issue编号) / Fixes #(issue number)
关联 #(issue编号) / Related to #(issue number)

## 测试 / Testing
描述您进行的测试以验证您的更改。为测试配置提供说明，以便我们能够重现。
Describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions for test configuration so we can reproduce.

**测试配置 / Test Configuration:**
- [ ] 单元测试 / Unit tests
- [ ] 集成测试 / Integration tests
- [ ] 端到端测试 / End-to-end tests
- [ ] 手动测试 / Manual testing

**测试环境 / Test Environment:**
- 操作系统 / OS: 
- 浏览器 / Browser: 
- Node版本 / Node version: 

## 截图 / Screenshots
如果适用，请添加截图来展示您的更改。
If applicable, add screenshots to demonstrate your changes.

## 检查清单 / Checklist
在提交PR之前，请确保满足以下要求：
Before submitting your PR, please make sure you meet the following requirements:

- [ ] 我已阅读并遵循[贡献指南](../CONTRIBUTING.md) / I have read and followed the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] 我已经对我的代码进行了自我审查 / I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] 我已经为我的代码添加了注释，特别是在难以理解的区域 / I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] 我已经对我的更改进行了相应的文档更新 / I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] 我的更改不会产生新的警告 / My changes generate no new warnings
- [ ] 我已经添加了证明我的修复有效或我的功能正常工作的测试 / I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] 新的和现有的单元测试在我的更改下都能通过 / New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] 任何依赖的更改都已合并并发布到下游模块中 / Any dependent changes have been merged and published in downstream modules

## 审查者注意事项 / Notes for Reviewers
为审查者提供任何特殊说明或需要关注的地方。
Provide any special instructions or areas of focus for reviewers.

## 部署注意事项 / Deployment Notes
如果此更改需要特殊的部署步骤，请在此说明。
If this change requires special deployment steps, please describe them here.

- [ ] 需要数据库迁移 / Requires database migration
- [ ] 需要环境变量更新 / Requires environment variable updates
- [ ] 需要依赖项更新 / Requires dependency updates
- [ ] 其他部署要求 / Other deployment requirements

## 进一步工作 / Further Work
列出与此PR相关的任何后续工作或改进。
List any follow-up work or improvements related to this PR.

---

感谢您的贡献！ / Thank you for your contribution!
